parameters.query:
WITH src AS (
  SELECT contact_officer_name,
         CASE
           WHEN contact_officer IS NULL THEN NULL
           WHEN length(REGEXP_REPLACE(contact_officer, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')) BETWEEN 1 AND 9
             THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(contact_officer, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')::int
           ELSE NULL
         END AS emp_id
  FROM production.raw_v2_boston_fio
  WHERE contact_officer IS NOT NULL
)
INSERT INTO production.v2_officer_id_map (employee_id, first_name, last_name, canonical_name)
SELECT DISTINCT ON (emp_id)
  emp_id,
  TRIM(SPLIT_PART(contact_officer_name, ',', 2)),
  TRIM(SPLIT_PART(contact_officer_name, ',', 1)),
  production.canonicalize_name(contact_officer_name)
FROM src
WHERE emp_id IS NOT NULL
  AND emp_id NOT IN (SELECT employee_id FROM production.v2_officer_id_map WHERE employee_id IS NOT NULL);

DELETE FROM production.v2_fio WHERE source = 'boston_fio';

WITH src AS (
  SELECT *,
         CASE
           WHEN contact_officer IS NULL THEN NULL
           WHEN length(REGEXP_REPLACE(contact_officer, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')) BETWEEN 1 AND 9
             THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(contact_officer, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')::int
           ELSE NULL
         END AS emp_id
  FROM production.raw_v2_boston_fio
)
INSERT INTO production.v2_fio
  (bpi_id, fc_num, contact_date, location, frisked, vehicle_searched,
   basis, circumstance, narrative, source, as_of)
SELECT DISTINCT ON (s.fc_num)
  m.bpi_id,
  s.fc_num,
  CASE
    WHEN s.contact_date IS NULL THEN NULL
    WHEN s.contact_date ~ '^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}' THEN s.contact_date::timestamptz
    ELSE NULL
  END,
  CONCAT_WS(', ',
           NULLIF(s.street, ''),
           NULLIF(s.city, ''),
           NULLIF(s.state, ''),
           NULLIF(s.zip, '')),
  NULL::boolean,
  NULL::boolean,
  s.basis,
  s.circumstance,
  s.contact_reason,
  'boston_fio',
  now()
FROM src s
LEFT JOIN production.v2_officer_id_map m ON
  (m.employee_id IS NOT NULL AND s.emp_id IS NOT NULL AND m.employee_id = s.emp_id)
  OR (s.emp_id IS NULL
      AND m.canonical_name IS NOT NULL
      AND s.contact_officer_name IS NOT NULL
      AND m.canonical_name = production.canonicalize_name(s.contact_officer_name))
WHERE s.fc_num IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY s.fc_num,
         (m.employee_id IS NOT NULL) DESC,
         (m.mptc_id IS NOT NULL) DESC,
         m.created_at NULLS LAST;

INSERT INTO production.v2_ingest_run (pipeline_name, started_at, finished_at, status, rows_in, rows_out)
VALUES (
  'bpi_ingest_boston_fio',
  now(), now(), 'success',
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM production.raw_v2_boston_fio),
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM production.v2_fio WHERE source = 'boston_fio')
);
